name: Take3Bounce VO Generator
description: An AI-powered voiceover orchestration engine using Gemini Flash and Gemini TTS to generate multiple performance variations (takes) from a single script.

commands: echo '🪣 Creating GCS Bucket for Audio and enabling CORS...'
gcloud storage buckets create gs://$GENMEDIA_BUCKET --project=$GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT --location=US || true
gcloud storage buckets update gs://$GENMEDIA_BUCKET --cors-file=cors.json || true
echo '🔐 Granting IAM Roles to the default compute service account...'

GENMEDIA_BUCKET.description: A globally unique name for the Google Cloud Storage bucket where generated audio files will be stored. The script will automatically create this bucket and configure CORS for you.

GEMINI_MODEL.description: The Gemini model used for script orchestration and markup.

GEMINI_TTS_MODEL.description: The Gemini model used for synthesizing the audio.

RECAPTCHA_SITE_KEY.description: (Optional) ReCaptcha Enterprise Site Key to protect the API from bot abuse.

REDIS_URL.description: (Optional) Redis connection URL for distributed rate limiting across instances.

BQ_DATASET.description: (Optional) BigQuery Dataset ID for tracking generation analytics. Must be manually created in your project prior to deployment.

BQ_TABLE.description: (Optional) BigQuery Table ID for tracking generation analytics. Must be manually created in your project prior to deployment.

DEMO_NAME.description: (Optional) The name attached to BigQuery telemetry events.
